---
title: "DHI"
format: html
---
```{r}
library(tidyverse) #this includes many packages and is the main package used in nearly all data wrangling
library(arrow) #this package handles parquet files
library(skimr) #this is particularly helpful when looking at new data or finding NA values
library(waldo)

events <- read_csv('../DHI/SH 11.4.25.csv') 

events2 <- events |> 
  fill(HERD:VCKDTE)

# pull out shifted rows
shifted_rows <- events2 |> 
  filter(is.na(EVENT) & is.na(DATE)) |>
  select(-EVENT, -DATE) |>
  rename(EVENT = USER21, DATE = USERD)

# fill rows back in
missing_rows <- which(is.na(events2$EVENT))
stopifnot(length(missing_rows) == nrow(shifted_rows))
events2[missing_rows, names(shifted_rows)] <- shifted_rows

# delete extra columns
events3 <- events2 |> 
  select(1:which(names(events3) == "EVENT"))




```
